hero.title: Products & Projects
hero.description: Five bootstrapped internet products built over 20 years. Each is a working business, not a startup pitch.

projects.name: clickfraud.ru
projects.tagline: Click fraud protection for Russian advertisers
projects.description: Detects and blocks invalid clicks on contextual ads. Protects advertising budgets from competitor bots, click farms, and automated fraud. Uses machine learning + behavioral signals.

projects.name: xmldatafeed.com
projects.tagline: Web scraping and price monitoring at scale
projects.description: Automated collection of pricing data, product catalogs, and competitor information. Built for e-commerce operators who need clean, structured data without building their own infrastructure.

projects.name: offlinecrm.ru
projects.tagline: Simple free CRM for small teams
projects.description: A no-frills CRM designed for small businesses that don't need enterprise complexity. Free to use. Focused on contact management, deals, and basic workflow tracking.

projects.name: tapki.com
projects.description: A search and discovery engine for products and catalogs. Built on Elasticsearch, optimized for large-scale product databases with fast full-text search and filtering.

projects.name: notissimus.com
projects.description: A small development studio focused on mobile applications. Builds and maintains apps for B2B clients across various industries.
